steps.text: Review the contract-draft pipeline reference and extract key requirements for a mutual NDA (parties, purpose, confidentiality terms, exclusions, term, governing law, remedies, boilerplate, and attorney-review disclaimer).
Outline the structure and headings of the mutual non-disclosure agreement tailored to Acme Corp and Beta LLC, including Washington governing law and evaluation of a potential partnership.
Draft the full mutual NDA text with placeholders [BLANK] for all unknown specifics (effective date, addresses, signatures, etc.), ensuring clear mutual obligations and standard NDA clauses.
Review the draft against the contract-draft checklist (clarity, consistency, defined terms, placeholders, jurisdiction, and attorney-review disclaimer) and revise as needed.
Prepare the final attorney-review-ready NDA draft in markdown format for the user.
